scope: Remove empty/placeholder official link that blocks deletion of a weak RawPoolItem after a stronger GitHub profile source has already been repaired and kept.

decisions.reason: 该 website 官方链接抓取结果几乎为空，仅有 Latest Posts 占位；人物已保留 GitHub 与 X 官方链接，且 GitHub profile RawPoolItem 已通过 GitHub API 修复为 keep，移除此空主页引用后可删除对应弱 RawPoolItem。
